creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
I think as long libpuginxml.so is installed in /usr/local/lib mkvtoolnix will link to it.

Textproc/puginxml should moved to another directory. (but then ftp/filezilla, orthanc,
orthanc-dicomweb and darktable must adjust pathes).
And I doubt this will happen.
